MemX — Product Hunt gallery cards (light)

Persona-led gallery at Product Hunt size (1270×760), shown scaled. Apple-caliber light theme — one refined background, single accent, screenshots as the hero. Per-card PNGs in ph_export/.

Card 1 · Hero
MemX
Meet MemX
Your whole life.
One question away.
The AI memory app that saves everything you'd forget — and hands it back the moment you ask.
Card 2 · Story
MemX
Why MemX
Stop texting yourself.
Start remembering.
Your notes, screenshots and voice memos are scattered across a dozen apps. MemX is the one private place that holds it all — and actually finds it when you need it.

Voice · any language
Ask out loud,
in any language.
